methodsAttempted.query: QS 381-430 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search, targeted official page extraction, and JSON scrape were used. Course pages, theses, research PDFs, generic AI literacy pages, and non-official tool examples were not expanded into named tool availability records.

artifacts.summary: QS381-430 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for Iowa State, Stony Brook, UCR, UCSC, Colorado State, DCU, Tampere, Masaryk, Buffalo, IE University, Essex, Mannheim, Konstanz, Bayreuth, Pavia, and Shenzhen University.

stopConditions: Stop after official source-backed tool-level evidence is captured.
Do not expand broad AI guidance, course policies, theses, research PDFs, training pages, or generic examples into named tool availability records.

artifacts.title: QS381-430 AI tools crawl report
artifacts.summary: Staged QS381-430 official AI tools records and left universities without explicit tool-level official evidence unexpanded.
limitations: Tool records are tracker-derived metadata and do not replace official university source language.
The pass only expands official public tool-level evidence, not broad AI guidance, training examples, course policies, theses, or generic tool mentions.
